data.content: Plan review rejected. The proposed implementation approach for the scanned-agents UI is feasible, but the plan is incomplete against the current codebase: it misses existing Codex/OpenAI expectations in src/lib/__tests__/settings-scan.test.ts and src/lib/__tests__/settings-coverage.test.ts, and it cites a non-existent src/lib/__tests__/agent-identity.test.ts. Revise the plan to include the actual test files and complete rename scope, then return it for review.
